description: App using body-parser.json() only — JSON parsing uses JSON.parse, never calls qs.parse. CVE-2022-24999 in qs@6.7.0 is not reachable.

provenance.ground_truth_notes: handleJsonPost → bodyParser.json() → JSON.parse; qs.parse is never called.

findings.human_justification: bodyParser.json() is the only body-parser API invoked; body-parser/lib/types/json.js uses JSON.parse with no qs dependency.
